old_value: {"id":"smallhold-4afr","title":"Push notifications (VAPID/WebPush)","description":"POST /api/v1/push/subscription — register a push subscription with endpoint URL, keys (p256dh, auth), and alerts preferences. Generate VAPID keypair on init. Send encrypted push payloads on mention, favourite, reblog, follow. Clients fall back to polling without this but native mobile clients (Tusky, Ivory) benefit significantly.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"mark@wolfssl.com","created_at":"2026-07-18T21:55:22.711948042Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-18T21:55:22.711948042Z"}
